entry.title: Re: Unable to Update manually added Standard Fields to St...
entry.content: @FabrizioD rather than focusing on the naming convention, please dig the BO ( Business Object ) if the standard REST API you are trying to tweak is built using RAP model.

entry.title: Re: Do we have a certificate for datasphere? thanks ~
entry.content: Hi Mrinal, please be aware that we follow a role based approach for our certifications, not a product-based approach. The role covers SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere modeling and data acquisition. From year to year, the SAP Datasphere part will naturally increase and the BW part will decrease over time. At some point several years from now, we may only have SAP Datasphere. But for now, SAP BW/4HANA remains the product with the wider variety of features..

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - How to access object information from a Car...
entry.content: Hi ! Thanks for your help. Sorry, but that line is not duplicated. You only deleted it and give and error with that correction, let me show you an scheenshoot from my VS:

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Analytic Model Series – Using Variables in Analytic Model
entry.content:
Nice Information it really helped.

Can anyone help me to understand how to change the sequence of variables in Analytical Model

entry.title: Re: Custom Business Configuration
entry.content: Thank you for this post . I created one business configuration using your blog for my custom table in S/4 HANA Public cloud and i am able to maintain entries using Custom business configuration fiori app. I have some bulk data to upload and wants to use Upload business configuration app But my same object not shows on Upload app to Upload via excel. Could you please guide us or have any other blog for Upload App.

entry.title: RAP action deep result: Field not found in the data container of complex type
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a problem implementing a static action with deep result in RAP managed scenario. At the end of my coding I fill the respective result structure, but I get a gateway error "/IWBEP/CM_V4_COS/009" that says "Field __VALUE_CONTROL_VCS-REFERENCEDOCUMENT not found in the data container of complex type CT_61661C579EEBDFC5D97EFEC39FA ".

The complex type has no structure __VALUE_CONTROL_VCS. Debugging I found a problem in /IWBEP/CL_V4_RESPONSE_INFO->/iwbep/if_v4_response_info~set_busi_data. In this method there is a call for /iwbep/cl_v4_converter=>convert_structure_outbound and I realized that source data and target data structures differ in this point. The source data structure has a Structure %control (as the result structure I filled in my coding) and the target structure is missing the %control structure, but has this __VALUE_CONTROL_VCS structure that looks quite similar to the %control structure.

What did I miss here?

entry.title: Re: UI5ers Buzz #57: Recently Used Values History for Smart Controls
entry.content: Is it possible to enable it in SAP Build Work Zone? I can't see an option to provide any parameters.

entry.title: united states compliance process for Employees to be working remotely
entry.content:
Hi All SF ONB Experts,

We have a requirement to only trigger one Tax form (compliance form for USA) for the employees working remotely.

Since, most positions in USA are remote for the organization but as of now system automatically triggers 2 tax and federal forms: one for the location where candidate resides and one for location of the position, Since the Employee will be working remote, the organization would want only one tax form to be completed for these candidates.

creating all locations from USA can't be a possible option since its Foundation data and it should be consistent with correct organisation locations.

Has anyone worked on this requirement and how was this worked, is there any option provided by SAP or any workarounds?

entry.title: Empowering the Future of Utilities: Highlights from 2024 SAP for Utilities Event
entry.content:
From September 9-11, 2024, we hosted over 1,200 professionals from more than 90 utilities at the annual SAP for Utilities event. The conference offered rich content and opportunities for collaboration while showcasing innovations that are driving the future of the utilities sector.

The event kicked off with Community Power Ups, bringing together professionals from Canadian utilities, energy utilities, enterprise architects, and water utilities for valuable discussions. Attendees also participated in a workshop on Energy Transformation and SAP Asset Management, diving into how technology is reshaping the industry.

Networking events added energy to the day, including a customer appreciation golf event at Normandy Golf Course, where 80 participants enjoyed a relaxed environment. This year, we introduced a padel tennis clinic, which welcomed 40 participants for an exciting afternoon of friendly competition.

 

 

 

We began the event with keynotes focused on the future of the energy transition, featuring leaders from Duke Energy, Marathon Digital Holdings, and GE Vernova. In the afternoon we had experts from AWS and NiSource discussed the role of cloud technologies in transforming the utilities landscape, and a partner panel who explored the challenges posed by the evolving grid.

Day two featured a keynote from Mick Ebeling, whose presentation on "making the impossible possible" inspired attendees. We also honored our Excellence Award winners, celebrating their accomplishments within the industry. 

 

 

 

 

Across the three days, attendees could access 54 different sessions led primarily by customer speakers. Topics included RISE with SAP, cloud, analytics, Enterprise Asset Management (EAM), Customer Information Systems (CIS), and emerging technology trends. Learning extended beyond traditional sessions, with learning labs, roadmap discussions, and one-on-one meetings with experts providing a rich variety of experiences.

A highlight of the event was the Executive Forum, which gathered top utility leaders for intimate discussions about the future of energy in a rapidly evolving digital landscape. Leaders from American Water, PG&E, SMUD, Chesapeake Utilities, and others engaged in conversations around sustainability, innovation, and the role of technology in shaping the future of utilities.

A special session, ASUG Women Connect, offered female professionals in the utilities sector a unique opportunity to focus on building and enhancing their personal brands. In partnership with PwC, this panel discussion featured influential voices such as Nada Kovacevic from BC Hydro, Annabelle Louie from PG&E, Sadi Fieldsend from PwC, and Amy Spruill from SAP. Attendees gained valuable strategies for professional growth and advancing their careers within the industry.

 

 

 

This year’s event also featured cutting-edge demos on the show floor, showcasing the latest advancements in AI, energy transition technologies, and business process solutions for utilities. Topics included financial insights and project management, sustainable work and asset management, fieldwork scheduling, and SAP Emarsys customer engagement. Attendees could also explore innovations like Signavio for accelerated transformation, SAP LeanIX for transparent enterprise architecture, cyber and physical security solutions, and SAP Business AI for utilities.

Attendees were encouraged to engage with these demos and interact with experts to discover how these solutions can shape the future trajectory of their organizations. As SAP North America’s leadership team shared in a welcoming message, "The future of utilities is powered by innovation, and we’re excited to be part of this transformative journey."

As the 2024 event wraps up, we’re already looking forward to next year’s gathering. Mark your calendars for September 8-10, 2025, in Denver, CO, where we will continue to explore the future of the utilities industry and the role of technology in shaping a sustainable, forward-thinking future.

Thank you to everyone who attended and contributed to the success of this year’s SAP for Utilities event. See you in Denver!

entry.title: Re: Alv grid + subtotal issue while exporting into spreadsheet
entry.content:
1) You mean you are using the function module REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY.

What means "table format"? Same as the output of REUSE_ALV_LIST_DISPLAY?

2) Probably a field catalog error. Run "SOS" to locate the error (search the forum by using ALV SOS).

entry.title: Build Process Automation Notifications Part 1 of 3 - Default Notifications
entry.content:
In September 2024, SAP Build Process Automation released standard notifications integrated by default into all running processes.
 
Now, with a simple configuration in BTP, all running tasks automatically generate notifications to the task recipient, keeping them up-to-date on their assignments wherever they are. Build Process Automation notifications use the SAP-standard Alert Notification Service, which means they are automatically sent over email, in-app notification center and mobile. More channels will be added in the future without any extra configuration work needed from administrators.
 
Here is how to get notifications:
  • enable the notifications feature in your BTP cockpit by following the adminstrator documentation here: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/enable-notifications 
  • add a task to a process
  • run the process

As you can see, there is no need to specify notification parameters as the default settings already handle the most common cases. In this scenario:
  • the notification will be sent by email and to the bell icon
    the bell icon is the notification center in SAP applications, like SAP Work Zone
  • there is no need to specify recipients twice
    the recipients will be the recipients of the task
  • each user decides if they want mobile notifications
    the recipients of the notification can personalize, to turn off channels like email or notification center, or to turn on notifications for mobile
SAP Build Process Automation processes control finely-tuned sequences of tasks, decisions and applications in order to ensure that company workflows run predictably and error-free. When employees are required to contribute, notifications help get their attention precisely at the moment it is needed.
 
The notifications provide context and quickly let the recipient understand and decide what needs to get done. Opening the tasks in MyInbox or the modern SAP Task Center gives more details and actions. In a soon-to-be-released upgrade, links will point directly to the tasks and the personalization views.

entry.title: Re: Field for Training Provider at Item Level
entry.content: We created a custom field called "Administered By" and made it a required field for new items. We use Source to ID our content vs our OOC. Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: solr admin page connection refused after upgrading to 9.5.0 and sap cx to 2211.27
entry.content:
This has been a problem for some time. Not just since 2211.27 or solr version 9.5.0.
After much trial and error, my colleagues and I decided to install a browser directly in the WSL in order to access solr directly from there.

entry.title: Re: crystal report footer blank space at end
entry.content: Hi Don, I added the network printer as local printer in the terminal server where I am testing this. Following is the Printer preferences.

entry.title: Extract Variable policy in SAP APIM - extracting client credentials from request header
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I've setup a REST API proxy that enables access via OAuth 2.0 on the ProxyEndpoint side.

On the TargetEndpoint side I have to authenticate using OAuth 2.0. I've developed the following two policies in order to enable authentication against the TargetEndpoint.

However, since the extract variable policy does not get the variable values, the flow goes into error. 

Any help in this regard would be greatly appreciated.

1. Extract Variable policy : It needs to extract the client_id and client_secret into variables which is input  from postman as grant type Client_credentials & client_id and client_secret

2. Basic Authentication : It needs to take the get the variables values from step 1 and create a Authorization header.


Extract Variable Code : 

<!-- Extract content from the request or response messages, including headers, URI paths, JSON/XML payloads, form parameters, and query parameters -->
<ExtractVariables async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
	<Variable name="clientid" />
	    	<Variable name="clientsecret" />
   
        <Header name="client_id" />
    <Header name="client_secret" />
<Source>header</Source>
</ExtractVariables>

Basic Authentication Code:

<BasicAuthentication async='true' continueOnError='false' enabled='true' xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
	<Operation>Encode</Operation>
	<IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>false</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
	<User ref='clientid'></User>
	<Password ref='clientsecret'></Password>
	<AssignTo createNew="true">sapapim.Authorization</AssignTo>
</BasicAuthentication>

The extract variable does not extract the client_id and client_secret as expected and an error is returned 

{
    "fault": {
        "faultstring": "Unresolved variable : clientid",
        "detail": {
            "errorcode": "steps.basicauthentication.UnresolvedVariable"
        }
    }
}

API flow screenshot:

entry.title: Use CDS custom entity as data source/association for other views
entry.content:
Hello Community!

We built a custom cds root entity which gets its data from a remote client proxy. Now we want to use this custom entity as a data source for other views or as association/join in other views. Every approach I tried failed so far - is there any solution to that?

Use custom entity as data source:

 

define view entity I_Entity2
  as select from I_CustomEntity

 

 Error: Entity "I_CustomEntity" cannot be used as the data source

Use custom entity in join statement:

 

define view entity I_Entity2
  as select from I_Entity1 join I_CustomEntity ....

 

Error: Entity "I_CustomEntity" cannot be used as the data source

Use custom entity as association:

 

define view entity I_Entity2
  as select from I_Entity1

  association [1] to I_CustomEntity as _Custom ...
{
  _Custom.Field1
}

 

Error: Target of association _Custom cannot be an abstract/custom entity

entry.title: Re: solr admin page connection refused after upgrading to 9.5.0 and sap cx to 2211.27
Re: liberation strategy connection
entry.content:
@SBach
Thank you!
My question is not about the “Flexible Workflow”, but about the classic workflow that is used from sap gui.
I mean, I want to be able to create a workflow in sap gui and that some people use sap gui to approve purchase orders and others use the fiori application.
So my question is if when creating the workflow from sap gui I can make this can be consumed from sap gui and also from the fiori my inbox application.
Please tell me if you understand me so I can explain it better in case I don't understand it.

Is it by some other name?

Hi

I tried a lot to join this event, however could not succeeded. Could you please share the link of recording, thanks and regards?

entry.title: Setting debug point in ADT class
entry.content:
Is there a way to set a breakpoint at a non-executable line in a class using ADT?
I have a class which inherits from another class. I want to debug my class, so that I can see my class constructor executing the class constructor of the superclass. 
The ADT debugger doesn't allow me to set a breakpoint at the method implementation , as it is a non-executable line.

Any ideas, please?

entry.title: How to push reminders for each required item in duration based program?
entry.content: Does anyone know how to push reminders for required items that are in a program that are due in a certain section of the program? Right now, just a reminder for the whole program goes out after the overall due date.

entry.title: Re: How to create a value help for custom and released domain fixed values?
entry.content: Value and Description works fine with OData V4. Those who are facing the issue might be using V2.

entry.title: Authorizations ME51N - I want to disable Save Action
entry.content:
Hello community , 

in my role i have transactions ME51N/ME52N/ME53N.

I want to disable on users to make Save - Create PR , but i want to have access to Hold / Park the PR 

How to disable the Save Button Activity ?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: A Deep Dive into Budget Availability Control for Cost Centers in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Editio
entry.content:
Hi @fairulnizam ,

Sure, this is perfectly working and makes totally sense.

You could e.g. have a warning message starting at 80% and setting an error message at 100%.

 

BR,
Marcel

entry.title: Re: Value Help with parameter does not open in Parameter...
entry.content:
Update:

In the mean time i could find out that parameters are in a value help not yet supported in case of a action with a a parameter cds view

entry.title: Sap Hana rename
entry.content:
Hello, 

I recover Sap Hana server from backup and change hostname.

In /hana/data and /hana/log there is not .dat files since we exclude them in backup.

I try to rename system but I got errors.

When I perform this operation in last year I was able to rename system and recover SYSTEMDB.

Logs:
13:44:45.885 - INFO: Renaming instance...
13:44:45.896 - INFO: Testing conversion of topology...
13:44:45.896 - INFO: Updating /hana/shared/HRP/HDB90/hostname01n/sapprofile.ini...
13:44:45.896 - INFO: Updating value 'SAPLOCALHOST' in section '' ('hostname01n' => 'hostname01nres')
13:44:45.896 - INFO: File '/hana/shared/HRP/HDB90/hostname01n/sapprofile.ini' updated
13:44:45.896 - INFO: Checking -convertTopology result...
13:44:45.962 - INFO: Switching to user id 1001 and group id 601.
13:44:45.962 - INFO: Starting external program /hana/shared/HRP/HDB90/exe/hdbnsutil
13:44:45.962 - INFO: Command line is: /hana/shared/HRP/HDB90/exe/hdbnsutil -convertTopology --oldHost=hostname01n --newHost=hostname01nres --test
13:44:46.797 - INFO: Output line 1: nameserver hostname01nres:39001 not responding.
13:44:46.798 - INFO: Output line 2: Opening persistence ...
13:44:46.834 - INFO: Output line 3: assign failed with persistence startup error. exception 1: no.3020151 (DataAccess/PageAccess/impl/DataVolumePartitionFiles.cpp:151) TID: 64328
13:44:46.834 - INFO: Output line 4: No DataVolume files found in path "/hana/data/HRP/mnt00001/hdb00001/"
13:44:46.834 - INFO: Output line 5: exception throw location:
13:44:46.834 - INFO: Output line 6: 1: 0x00007fff927188b0 in PageAccess::DataVolumePartitionImpl::init(Configuration::ConfigurationHandler&, Diagnose::StatisticsData const*, PageAccess::ExtendedDataVolumePartitionInfo const&, bool
)+0x17e0 at DataVolumePartitionFiles.cpp:151 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 7: 2: 0x00007fff92723370 in PageAccess::DataVolumePartition::createInstance(ltt::allocator&, Configuration::ConfigurationHandler&, Diagnose::StatisticsData const*, PageAccess::ExtendedDataVolumePar
titionInfo const&, bool, bool)+0x1b0 at DataVolumePartitionImpl.cpp:114 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 8: 3: 0x00007fff92733bb8 in PageAccess::DataVolumeImpl::addPartition(unsigned int, ltt::basic_string<char, ltt::char_traits<char>, ltt::integral_constant<int, 64> > const&, bool, bool, bool)+0xe8 a
t DataVolumeImpl.cpp:464 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 9: 4: 0x00007fff92734c0c in PageAccess::DataVolumeSPI::createInstance(ltt::allocator&, Configuration::ConfigurationHandler&, Diagnose::StatisticsData const*, PageAccess::PageIO const&, PageAccess::ExtendedDataVolumeInfo const&)+0x30c at DataVolumeImpl.cpp:434 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 10: 5: 0x00007fff926a5980 in PageAccess::PageIO::createInstance(ltt::allocator&, Configuration::ConfigurationHandler&, Diagnose::StatisticsData const*, PageAccess::ExtendedDataVolumeInfo const&)+0x240 at PageIOImpl.cpp:766 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 11: 6: 0x00007fff92b5c2a0 in DataAccess::PersistenceManagerImpl::createInstance(ltt::refcounted_handle<DataAccess::PersistenceConfigurationSPI>&, bool, bool, bool)+0x1650 at PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp:1954 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 12: 7: 0x00007fff92b80180 in DataAccess::PersistenceManager::open(ltt::refcounted_handle<DataAccess::PersistenceConfiguration> const&, bool)+0xc0 at PersistenceManager.cpp:164 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 13: 8: 0x00007fff958e9d48 in PersistenceLayer::PersistenceSystem::initialize(NameServer::ServiceStartInfo const&, bool, PersistenceLayer::PERSISTENCE_MODE)+0x788 at PersistenceSystem.cpp:456 (libhdbpersistence.so)

13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 15: 10: 0x00007fff8f086ad4 in PersistenceController::startup(PersistenceLayer::PERSISTENCE_MODE, NameServer::ServiceStartInfo*, bool, DataAccess::TablePreloadWriteCallback*, DataAccess::TablePreloadReadCallback*, Backup::RecoverCbc_Federation*)+0x1434 at PersistenceController.cpp:611 (libhdblogger.so)
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 16: 11: 0x00007fff9c414268 in NameServer::Topology::startPersistence(NameServer::ServiceStartInfo&, bool) const+0x28 at Topology.cpp:280 (libhdbns.so)

13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 22: 17: 0x0000000125be66c8 in main+0x998 at TopologyCmdAction.cpp:29 (hdbnsutil)
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 23: 18: 0x00007fff90626fe0 in System::mainWrapper(int, char**, char**, void*)+0x50 at IsInMain.cpp:339 (libhdbbasis.so)
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 24: 19: 0x00007fff8f346620 in generic_start_main.isra.0+0x140 (libc.so.6)

entry.title: Re: Withholding tax table taxable amount error
entry.content: hi thanks for the response for some reason sap does not display the note is there another place where i can check it?

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - How to access object information from a Car...
entry.content: Omit line#89 from your page definition and give it a try or use the page definition shared by me earlier.

entry.title: Re: Interest in Participating in the Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content: yes

entry.title: Re: Database Migration Option (DMO) of SUM - Introduction
entry.content:
Hi @Asif_0211 ,

the migration of DMO considers all DDIC table definitions and related table content, this includes custom tables as well. 

Regards, Boris

entry.title: Re: Delivery address in PO item level
entry.content: This is the answer for me!

entry.title: Re: CDS VIEW ENTITY - CURR / QUAN calculated field gives...
entry.content:
Hi Bheemesh,

Thanks for the suggestion. I tried this, but this gives amount in FLTP, with large number of decimals.

I needed the amount in 2 decimals, so I used the abap.dec(23,2) in the cast expression, instead of abap.fltp

that worked well and you can see that in my other comment which I marked as solution.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - How to access object information from a Car...
entry.content: Sorry, but it doesn't work. I have also created the page again without any buttons and I have the same problem. I suspect it is a bug.

entry.title: custom v2 service in mdk mobile connectivity destination throwing error
entry.content:
here is my service : http://host:port/sap/opu/odata/SAP/ZDEMO_MDK_SRV/v2 in mobile connectivity destination 

i had checked in the logs the error will be :The host name http://host:port/sap/opu/odata/SAP/ZDEMO_MDK_SRV/$metadata is unknown 

how to resolve it when i try to create project in btp it was throwing error that : Error: Failed to access backend with error Request failed with status code 502, please check your destination in SAP Mobile Services cockpit

entry.title: Unable to Add a View Instead of a Fragment in Custom Section of Fiori App
entry.content:
I am developing a Fiori application with a CAP CDS backend and a Fiori frontend (using TypeScript). On a specific page, I want to add a custom section that utilizes a view so that I can leverage the power of a view controller. However, when I attempt to create a custom section via the UI tools, a fragment is generated instead.

Fragments lack the flexibility and functionality I need compared to views (especially the ability to use controllers). I have attempted to manually add a view in place of a fragment, but I encountered difficulties when trying to integrate it into the page.

Steps to Reproduce:

  1. Create a new Fiori project.
  2. Add a custom section to any page using the UI tool specifying "View" (results in a fragment).
  3. Manually replace the fragment with a view.

Expected Behavior: I expect to be able to create a custom section using a view, so that I can take advantage of the controller for better functionality.

Actual Behavior: The generated custom section is a fragment, and manually adding a view does not work as expected.

entry.title: Re: How to settle AuC to statistical internal order
entry.content: I want to clarify that we are expecting SAP settles the AuC posting to the statistical IO and after that settles to the IO cost center as in the standard. However it settling directly to the IO cost center and is not posting the IO.

entry.title: Re: Data Services code migration & maintenance: simplify your lifecycle & improve your code
entry.content: Great post for SAP BODS Admins ...!!!

entry.title: Re: Setup and Configure custom documents on Document Information Extraction service on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there any capability in document information extraction tool to determine the language of the document uploaded ? We need this for our use case to send it to application class in ABAP.

Thanks,

Preetham T K

entry.title: Re: Use CDS custom entity as data source/association for...
entry.content:
Hello,

you cannot use custom entities as data source. You can just integrate/expose it as an association without accessing a field. For example: 

define view entity I_Entity2
  as select from I_Entity1

  association [1] to I_CustomEntity as _Custom
{
  _Custom
}

 

reference (answer from Andre Fischer)

entry.title: Re: Description with capital letters ignored in IBP excel
entry.content:
No other solution than described above.
Even if the description is not a key. Below won´t work:
Product ID               Description
A123                        LARGE
B123                        large

entry.title: Inspirational Journeys of Innovation and Growth - Customer Success Stories
entry.content:
Discover the latest customer stories showcasing how companies are leveraging SAP's innovative solutions to drive growth and transformation together with SAP.

2024

  • Petrobras: The Critical Importance of Intelligent Asset Management and Maintenance Reliability
  • Shin Pyeongtaek Power Co.: Powering western Korea with eco-friendly energy
  • Equinor Boosts Asset Performance with Condition-Based Maintenance Enabled by SAP Asset Performance Management Plus: Equinor TAC Insights whitepaper
  • PX Energy: Building an IT infrastructure from the ground up in record time
  • Eastland Group: Gaining Improved Insights into System Performance
  • Precision Drilling: Successfully addressing obstacles
  • Oil India Limited - Journey to RISE with SAP - watch the video
  • OMV is Using AI to Better Analyze and Manage Their Spending
  • ExxonMobil’s Transition Is Grounded in Facts About The New Energy Mix 
  • Mittal Energy Limited: Fuelling App Development Transformation (Watch the video 1, Watch the video 2)
  • CEPSA Elevating Customer Experience and Improving Operations with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (Video)
  • Hitachi Energy Enhanced Supply Chain Management Based on SAP S/4HANA (Video)
  • Oklahoma Gas & Electric and Brightspeed Total Workforce Management Evolution: How OG&E and Brightspeed Manage Employees and Contingent Workers - (Article - News.SAP.Com)
  • HPCL-Mittal Energy Limited: Fuelling App Development Transformation (Video)

 

2023

  • Open Grid Europe Gaining New Geospatial Data Capabilities to Better Understand Asset Performance
  • Santos 2023 Best Run Awards: Live in 7 Months, Consolidating Oil Search & Santos to S/4HANA
  • Atem: Speeding the Digitalization of a Strategic Acquisition with Transformation as a Service
  • MAIRE: Fostering The Global Energy Transition With Its Own Transition To The Cloud
  • Singapore LNG: Corporation optimizing business processes with SAP Cloud and Digital Core 
  • OMV: How Does a Road Map to Digital Transformation Help Bring Sustainability Goals Within Reach?
  • MOL Group Digitalizes Procurement with SAP Ariba
  • Woodside Energy Automates HR Processes
  • Crescent Petroleum: Energy Transition Journey with SAP S/4HANA
  • Soleum Aims to Revolutionize the Energy System - Fuel from Macauba Trees   
  • Galp: Energy Transition Journey
  • Snam: Committing to Energy Safety, Sustainability, and Growth Opportunities
  • Marler Integrity makes pipe dream a reality with SAP Business One
  • Baker Hughes: Boosting supply chain resilience through ambitious procurement transformation
  • Optimizing Goods Transportation Planning and Execution with the SAP Transportation Management Application
  • Crescent Petroleum's Energy Transition Journey
  • NineDot Energy: Scaling Technology Systems to Exceed Sustainable Energy Demands

entry.title: Re: Error "Session ID was not specified" when creating DF...
entry.content:
Hi @DevJ !

Thanks a lot, it works ! Even if my BOBJ version is not the one impacted by your SAP Note, my issue is resolved with this workaround.

Have a good day.

PL

entry.title: Re: A Beginner's demo for pushing data from SAP CPI to SOLACE
entry.content: Thank you for the detailed steps. For scenarios involving Pub/Sub messaging and data exchange between CPI and SOLACE, integrating through CPI with the SOLACE Pub/Sub adapter is indeed the best approach. This setup ensures efficient message handling and reliable communication, leveraging CPI's robust integration capabilities.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Event Mesh Adapter: OAuth [5] Authorization Code + Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AAD)
entry.content: Informative blog .

entry.title: Re: Accelerate move to SAP Integration Suite with SAP Integration Suite Testing Service
entry.content:
Hello Michael,

You can reach out to me on amrita.laxmi@sap.com for more details on the service offering.

Thanks,

Amrita

entry.title: Re: KSW5- Public CLoud WBS to WBS
entry.content: Hi friends, actually we need to distribute the amounts to WBS's from WBS's. We were doing that in GUI systems with KSW5. How could I do in Public Cloud system? Thank you for your responses..

entry.title: Re: CX Onboarding Videos and Blogs Supporting Adoption
entry.content: Thank you for the great overview to the adoption topic!

entry.title: Re: B2B Integration Factory services to unlock the power of SAP Integration Suite's B2B capabilities
entry.content:
Hi , 

This blog provides a comprehensive overview of the B2B Integration Factory's role in leveraging SAP Integration Suite's B2B capabilities. The focus on efficient migration using AI-based tools, the development of custom extensions, and pre-packaged integration content is particularly valuable. The emphasis on strategic advisory and tailored enablement services will help businesses effectively transition and optimize their B2B integration processes. Great insights for anyone looking to enhance their B2B landscape!

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Setup and Configure custom documents on Document Information Extraction service on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi Preetham,

You can check if languageCodes JSON Field of the response in Get Result API fulfils your purpose.

https://help.sap.com/docs/document-information-extraction/document-information-extraction/get-result

Regards,

Tejas

entry.title: Re: regarding BP
entry.content: In BP transaction, go to tab "Address Overview" and enter city for all the rows listed.

entry.title: Re: Error: Expected 'OData-Version' header with value '4.0' but received value '4.0;' in response fo
entry.content: well it seems northwinds understanding on how the header value should be filled differs from how UI5 expects this... If I understand https://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_Versioning right , northwind service is wrong. But UI5 could be more tolerant... I suggest to file an issue at https://openui5.org/

entry.title: Re: SAP Integrated Business Planning for Inventory Fundamentals
entry.content:
Hi silvia_gaber , 

This e-learning course on SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP) for Inventory Fundamentals is a valuable resource for optimizing inventory management. It covers essential topics such as inventory target calculations, the impact of forecast and supply variability, and multi-stage inventory concepts. The course offers practical insights into safety stock calculation and inventory optimization workflows. For those looking to enhance their supply chain performance, this self-paced course provides in-depth knowledge and actionable skills. Thank you for the details . 

Regards,

Azmath.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Development with SAP Build Code
entry.content: List Reports Issue - I am getting the above issue after upgradation from 1709 to 2023 version. Please provide the solution. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Issue on releasing specific vendors in MRBR
entry.content: As of the moment. I'm limited on using BDC but thanks

entry.title: Re: Error "Create an application copy. There is no copy m...
entry.content:
Hello Stefan! Thanks for the link. I had been trying to follow these steps, but I've hit some roadblocks.

For example:

  • I haven't been able to create the package in step 1 (I'm requesting help from the dev team to do that, but it would be nice to have a link to step-by-step instructions in the documentation.) 
  • The search for the app id (step 4) in the customizing tenant turns up empty:

    Might that be because the package from step 1 is not existing yet?

Thanks,

Joerg.

entry.title: Re: NCo 3.1.5.0 SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcConfigParamet...
entry.content:
Yes, I'm running the application inside Visual Studio in debugging mode. I'm not sure which debugger setting I need to change to be honest. Can you please elaborate the steps? 

I disabled 'System.TypeInitializationException' from Exception Settings but it still doesn't work. Here is entire exception:

The type initializer for 'SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcConfigParameters' threw an exception.
System.IO.FileNotFoundException: Could not load file or assembly 'System.Configuration.ConfigurationManager, Version=5.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=cc7b13ffcd2ddd51'. The system cannot find the file specified.
File name: 'System.Configuration.ConfigurationManager, Version=5.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=cc7b13ffcd2ddd51'
at SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcConfigParameters.LoadConfiguration()
at SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcConfigParameters..cctor() in D:\depot as\789_REL\gen\optU tamd64\krn fc co3\krn fc co3\sapnco\RfcConfiguration.cs:line 926

 

Below is my test code:
simple testexception

references

entry.title: Re: SAP Yard Logistics - Chapter 1
entry.content:
Hi Nefeli,
I would always recommend to start without a loading scheme (not mandatory), but you can also check your packaging materials if they are both 5 M long?

entry.title: Re: Provision users from Microsoft Azure AD to SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication
entry.content:
Hello @harjeetjudge,

I’m having trouble with provisioning the "department" attribute from Azure to IAS.

When I use this code:

 

{ "sourcePath": "$.department",

"targetPath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:enterprise:2.0:User']['department']", "optional": true }

 

Then I get this error with statusCode: 400, Response: {"schemas":["urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:Error"],"status":"400","detail":"Unknown value 'departit' for attribute 'urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:enterprise:2.0:User:department'","scimType":"invalidValue"}, 

When I use this code:

 

{
                "sourcePath": "$['resourceExtensions']['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:enterprise:2.0:User']['department']",
                "targetPath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:enterprise:2.0:User']['department']",
                "optional": true
            },

 

I don’t get any errors, but the "department" attribute is not provisioned to IAS and does not appear in IAS.

Could anyone help me understand what might be causing this issue?

Many Thanks

entry.title: Re: Description with capital letters ignored in IBP excel
entry.content:
If you are using Excel add-in pre 2408 release (most probably): this is expected behavior, as it allows for only one way of spelling the attribute name/

Good news is that this was fixed with the most recent Excel add-in version: 2408, as detailed here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_INTEGRATED_BUSINESS_PLANNING/a650f937e78c4a959c19111d51215c09/792d97fd39fb452badfe21e9d91574a5.html?parentHref=/whats-new/a1775012e3d04fd2b2b974c1aaa7d93b?locale=en-US&parentName=What%27s+New+Viewer+-+SAP+Integrated+Business+Planning+for+Supply+Chain+(SAP+IBP)+2408

 

Solution : update IBP Excel add-in to 2408 version.

entry.title: Re: Issue on releasing specific vendors in MRBR
entry.content: BDC should be used for dialog transactions not for report transaction as MRBR. You really should use SUBMIT ... WITH instead.

entry.title: Re: custom v2 service in mdk mobile connectivity destinat...
entry.content:
Have you verified that your cloud connector is properly connected and that your destination uses the correct location ID?

Your Mobile Services destination has a property Cloud Connector Location ID that must be set to the location ID value from the parenthesis (if set) for the cloud connector connection

Mobile Services Destination

Cloud Connector Info from BTP cockpit

I would also recommend clicking the Open in Browser button from the Mobile Services destination list in Mobile Connectivity to open the destination and pass authentication through to verify the connection.

If the Open in Browser window opens to the service root you can replace the ?auth=uaa with /$metadata to verify you can access the metadata for the odata service.  If that works you should be ready to consume the destination.

entry.title: Re: Setting debug point in ADT class
entry.content: Why not setting the breakpoint at the first line of the class constructor implementation? (of your class or of the inherited class)

entry.title: Re: Join SAP at the SLB Digital Forum in Monaco
entry.content: Check out Peter's article on the SLB Digital Forum Kick-Off: Schlumberger Digital Forum 2024 in Monaco Kick-Off - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Problem with a condition appearing twice in the price analysis.
entry.content: Hey, did you find the reason for it? I have the same problem but it is conditions in invoice. I have a requirement for condition type zyxw, which works for pretty much everything expect for one certain process. There it also says for the first one, requirement not met but then somehow there is the condition type a second type and the second time it will get used, which is wrong. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Use CDS custom entity as data source/association for...

I have attached the screenshots of report, template logic. 

Kindly Suggest the coding for the template.

 

 

 

Thanks & Regards

Sunil

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano

  • SAP Managed Tags:

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance  , SAP Analytics Cloud for planning , FIN Controlling , SAP S/4HANA Finance  , FIN Profitability Analysis  

My name is Eman Kassem from Egypt I'm an ambitious woman working in IT sector having experience of around 6 years as a SAP consultant, I am trying to be professional Consultant that gain experience from work, self study and certificates to grow my career in this direction, I'm very passionate to be well known a professional SAP FICO Consultant in my market place. I'm already learning from SAP Learning Platform. I would like to go deeper in SAP learning with certification preparation.
i Need your support to afford obtaining certificate, i will be awaiting providing the certificate code. 

I'm following under below categories:

- Women
- People looking to switch their careers mid-life

At the end I would like to thank SAP team for this great initiative to contribute in the growth of others.

Regards Eman.

entry.title: Re: RAP action deep result: Field not found in the data c...
entry.content:
I had the issue in one of my system, when I try to replicate the same in other system, the issue is not happening.

for the system which has the issue, you can remove "with control" in the behavior definition of the abstract entity, that should solve your issue.

entry.title: Re: Is is possible to do quick sum up/average by selectin...
entry.content:
Yes, you can add a "formula" , which is sort of a Key Figure created on the fly. 

Please see below further details https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_INTEGRATED_BUSINESS_PLANNING/abee3923ad4d4722b6f10b0fe6cf4cef/5603412feb1e4628879f1e0fd7ac5401.html?q=formula

entry.title: ODP ODATA Skip Token and Delta Token issue
entry.content:
Hi community, 

we've created a ODP select for a large table and want to provide an ODATA endpoint to the external systems. 

Since the table has a few hundreds of thousend records we activated paging. 

The issue is: 

In order to test it we need to do request by request with the skip tokens provided in the response. 
Only when we invoke the service with the last skip token, we get the delta token in the response body. 

Question: 

Is there any way to work with the delta token from the beginning. 
Szenario is, that the service consumer does not want to retrieve the whole table request by request with the skip tokens first. Instead of that they want to retrieve the delta only. 


Thanks for any advice.

entry.title: Re: How to create a value help for custom and released domain fixed values?
entry.content:
I don't understand your comment. 

The implementation shown does not depend on the type of service binding and will work for both V4 and V2.

Regards, 

Andre

entry.content:
Hi ,

entry.title: Re: Copy Form Settings for Selected Forms
entry.content: In your screenshot, the "Linda Hudson" user would represent the "new employee" you referred to in your scenario, correct? She is the receiver of the copied settings, yes? I always get concerned that I have the direction of the settings being copied turned around the wrong way in my mental model.

entry.title: Re: Release Notes for SQL Anywhere 17.0 SP1 PL17 Build 7821 are not available
entry.content: Can't comment on when SAP provides files - but the readme file is always contained within the download itself, which is an archive within an archive. So you can just open the contained SA17011_Windows_7821_EBF.exe as an archive and have a look at its have a look at the contained "ReadMe_EBF.html" file.

entry.title: Re: Release Notes for SQL Anywhere 17.0 SP1 PL17 Build 78...
entry.content:
Can't comment on when/why SAP provides files - but the readme file is always contained within the download itself, which is an archive within an archive.

So you can just open the contained SA17011_Windows_7821_EBF.exe as an archive and have a look at the contained "ReadMe_EBF.html" file.

entry.title: Re: A few updates from SAP Business One Support
entry.content:
Hello Supporthij!

It does but you need to be logged in with your SAP Universal ID and you might have to click the link twice. Also, you need to be a partner - the material is for partners. 

Let me know,

Jesper

entry.title: Security structure in SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

I am new in the security administration of SAC. Can someone guide me how we can start with managing security in SAC. I have been told to create a matrix for standard roles available and then create custom roles out of it.

What all we have to consider while creating a custom role and what best practices to be followed if we are starting with security in SAC.

Thanks,

Jain

entry.title: Don't Miss Out: SAP CIAM for B2B Essentials Live Session!
entry.content:
On behalf of the CRM & CX Product Learning CoE Team, it is my pleasure to invite you in this blog post to the live session: SAP CIAM for B2B Essentials.

What is it about?

The objective of this session is to get to know the capabilities of the CIAM for B2B of SAP Customer Data Cloud through explanations and demos. The session topics cover the understanding of how to implement partner organizations, as well as the way to manage the organization access using the user selfservice delegated administration. During the session, Policy Based Access Control (PBAC) will be also discussed and demonstrated.

Target Audience 

  • Business End Users 
  • Technical Consultants
  • Functional Consultants
  • Administrator

How can you book it?


This live session is available on SAP Learning Hub. You will need to have a subscription.
You can click here  to register for this session.

Course Details


Date: 15 October April 2024
Time: From 03:00 PM to 05:00 PM (GMT +2)

 

Please Note


For a better understanding of the live session’s content, it’s recommended to also attend the:

  • SAP CIAM for B2B microlearning videos
  • SAP Customer Data Cloud C4H620 ILT training


before or after attending the live session.

entry.title: Re: Full view in collaboratio hub is automatically change...
entry.content:
Good day ghemraj,

Thank you for your inquiry to the Customer Community.  We have been advised that there is a known issue in this regard, and the SAP Development Team is working on a resolution.  If you would like to be made aware when the issue is resolved, you can create a case via SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password). 

You will need to select the specific SAP Signavio product / component when creating your case.  If you decide to create a ticket, please advise so that your case will be linked to the issue, and you'll receive an update when it's resolved.
 
Kind regards,

Kantrice D.

entry.title: Dynamic date filter in SAP Data Intelligence Cloud operator
entry.content:
Hello Community,
 
I am using SAP Application consumer Gen2 operator to fetch odata calls from an entity. I am able to filter the data with odata query using below settings.
 
"selectOptions": [
{
"name": "lastModifiedDateTime",
"elements": [
{
"comparison": ">=",
"low": "2023-06-01 00:00:00.1234"
}
]
}
]
 
 
However, I want to run the pipeline with automatic lastModifiedDateTime like Today's date or specific days from today. How can I define this in the diagram/json format of the operator? Is there a way to define custom variables in the pipeline and automatic query to populate the variable without manual intervention?
 
Any suggestions are appreciated.
 
Regards,
Kiran

entry.title: SAP Signavio Best Practises
Re: Error while creating user with Identity Directory API...
entry.content: Have you resolved this issue?

entry.title: Re: Where is data stored maintained in SAP Build Apps (from Visual Cloud Functions or from the App)
entry.content: Does this mean that SAP Build Apps has no persistence of data ? All the app logic and data maintained in the generated Application is stored locally ? Even backend functionality (Visual Cloud Functions) has no persistence ? I would have imagined that the VCF data model is stored in a structured way somehow. I would also have imagined that this data can be accessed then. Or do we need to generate a query service and then invoke it from elsewhere ?

entry.title: Custom Fields (Characteristics) for Margin Analysis (Profitability Analysis) in S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
1. Basic Information about custom Characteristics (Custom Fields)
  • Key users can add custom fields to margin analysis by utilizing the "Accounting: Market Segment" business context.
  • You can add up to 120 custom fields using the "Accounting: Market Segment" business context.
  • With this context, you can include the following types of custom fields:
    • Code List (Recommended)
    •  Numerical Text
    • Text

 

  • Custom fields can be deleted even if postings have already been made using them.

 

  1. Custom Field (Characteristic) Creation

Custom Field App:

Clear Create (+)

Type option you have:

  • Code List (Recommended)
  • Numerical Text
  • Text

Click: Create and Edit

You need to activate the fields where they are required. Each section provides available options; identify your area of interest or need and activate the relevant fields accordingly.

We have Enabled below services under User Interfaces:

Cost Centers Actuals

Manage Journal Entries

Post General Journal Entries

Manage Recurring Journal Entries

Journal Entry Item and many other.

Save

and then Publish. It may take a while.

It got published.

 

  1. Inputting Values for Custom Fields

There are three following options to enter values for custom fields:

  • Substitution Rules

You can create substitution rules for custom fields through the "Accounting: Market Segment" business context, available in the Manage Substitution/Validation Rules app.

  • Manual Selection in Manual Entries

Field values for custom fields can be entered manually.

  • Substitution Using Business Add-In (BAdI)

The relevant enhancement option is the Business Add-In Market Segment Extension Fields Substitution (FINS_MARKET_SEGMENT_SUB), which allows you to determine extension characteristics using the market segment.

- Create a custom field through a pre-existing CDS view.

- Generate a custom field by creating a derivation rule through a custom business object.

- Develop a custom field based on another custom field that was previously derived.

(Please Consult with Technical Consultant)

Manage Substitution / Validation Rules – Journal Entry App

Create

 

Substitution Type: Substitute with Constant

Save

Then Activate.

 

  1. Transaction Posting with Manually Custom Fields Update

Create Outgoing Invoice (FI Customer Billing)

Region Field

Note: A functional consultant can manually derive a custom field (characteristic) or through substitution. However, if you wish to use BAdi, you will need to seek assistance from a technical consultant.

entry.title: Error updating ADT in Eclipse 2023-09
entry.content:
I have received attached error when updating ABAP Development Tools in Eclipse Version: 2023-09 (4.29.0).

The update was not successful due to missing dependency tools for each tools. 

Also downloaded 2024-06 and 2024-09 version and tried to install ADT by referring https://tools.eu1.hana.ondemand.com/ but faced same issue.

Is there any workaround for this?

or we have to wait until it is fixed. Any idea when it will be solved?

entry.title: Re: Can we download the .mtar file from the SAP Cloud Transport Management Service?
entry.content: I have the same problem, should download it for SAP support.

entry.title: Is standard field Employee Profile "country" syncronized with the "Country/Region" in Job Info?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we would like to know if the standard "country" field in Manage Business Configuration --> Employee Profile --> Standard --> country is connected through standard sync with the "Country/Region" field in Job Information. 

Thank you in advance for your time.

entry.title: Re: Release Notes for SQL Anywhere 17.0 SP1 PL17 Build 78...
entry.content: Good point. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Work Schedule Creation Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

there is no solution for this requirement. I did not check, but I am pretty sure this is mentioned in the implementation guide. You cannot have got these kinds of shifts in Successfactors and I even don´t see any workaround to cover double shifts. I can advice to create an enhancement request, but honestly I doubt that it will be picked up soon. A cloud solution is always a standard solution. Double shifts do occur in some branches and for some employees, but it is not kind of standard.

Best regards

Volker
